prompt: Create a landing page for a local bakery called The Morning Knead in Portland. Everything sourdough — bread, pastries, pizza dough. They sell online and deliver locally. Rustic but modern vibe.

assertions.description: Hero contains an animated bakery visual (rising bread, steam, flying pastries)
Uses warm amber/golden accent color appropriate for food/bakery
Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
Headline is specific to sourdough, not generic
Stats section with at least 3 numbers
Product grid with at least 4 cards
Final CTA/delivery section with form and button
Copy mentions Portland for local identity
